title: Smoky Silky Venezulan Trout Paella
description: A romantic and flavorful venezulan-inspired paella dish featuring smoky trout, silky textures, and a mediterranean twist.

ingredients.name: Venezulan-Style Sofrito
ingredients.notes: make with garlic, cilantro, scallions, and a squeeze of lime

ingredients.name: Chorizo
ingredients.notes: use Spanish-style chorizo for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Saffron
ingredients.notes: use high-quality saffron threads for best flavor

ingredients.name: Fish Stock
ingredients.notes: use store-bought or homemade fish stock

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chorizo and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add sofrito and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Add trout fillets and cook, skin side up, until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add arborio rice, stirring to coat with oil and mix with chorizo and sofrito.
Add white wine and cook, stirring to deglaze the pan, until the liquid is almost completely absorbed, about 3-4 minutes.
Add fish stock, saffron, and furikake (if using). Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the rice is tender and the liquid is mostly absorbed, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in cannellini beans and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with smoked paprika and lemon juice to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
